summary: Episode 3: Noor's courtyard reading circle began under the fig tree — children gathered, and Tariq taught counting with a borrowed abacus, discovering he loves teaching. Salim hinted he has something to give Tariq, sensing his gift. Noor still doesn't know her doorstep gift came from Salim, and Tariq still keeps the secret. The lesson-book still needs pages copied by hand.
open_threads: Salim plans to give Tariq something — perhaps his first reed pen
The lesson-book still needs pages copied by hand
Noor still doesn't know who left the doorstep gift
The spice merchant wants his abacus back by market day
